properties.titulo_evento: US strikes Iranian sites after Iran launches drones, in latest Gulf flare-up
properties.descricao: U.S. forces struck Iranian coastal radar sites on Saturday after shooting down drones launched by Iran toward the Strait of Hormuz, the U.S. military said.

properties.titulo_evento: France to test its own AI-powered battlefield command in June NATO exercise
properties.descricao: The French Army has developed its own large-language model for staff officers, called Berthier, named after Napoleon’s chief of staff.

properties.titulo_evento: Joint Chiefs head makes first official visit to post-Maduro Venezuela
properties.descricao: The visit comes five months after the high-risk U.S. military operation to remove Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro.

properties.titulo_evento: Police say two suspects have been shot and killed in Israel gun attack
properties.descricao: Police say two suspects have been shot and killed in Israel gun attack.

properties.titulo_evento: Al Jazeera reports from Beirut after Israeli attack
properties.descricao: Multiple explosions have hit Beirut’s southern suburbs as Israel launches new attacks, claiming to target Hezbollah.

properties.titulo_evento: From online class to Revolution Square: A Tehran teacher’s routine amid war
properties.descricao: Al Jazeera follows a teacher who navigates a new life marked by a weak internet, soaring prices, and solidarity rallies.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran’s World Cup team arrives in Mexico as US visa row continues
properties.descricao: Iran’s national football team has arrived in Mexico ahead of its World Cup matches in the US.

properties.titulo_evento: Does Israel really think it can get rid of Hezbollah in Lebanon?
properties.descricao: It’s hard to assume that ‘anything positive’ for Lebanon can come from its talks with Israel, argues analyst Imad Harb.

properties.descricao: Race between right-wing Fujimori and left-wing Sanchez follows first round of voting marred by logistical issues.

properties.descricao: Israeli attacks came near Khan Younis, in Gaza City and Deir el-Balah as Hamas and other groups met mediators in Cairo.

properties.titulo_evento: Zelensky in Downing Street for Ukraine war talks with European leaders
properties.descricao: Zelensky's meeting with Ukraine's staunchest European allies comes as US President Donald Trump's focus has shifted to the war with Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: Steve Rosenberg: Russia's economic forum overshadowed by drone attacks on St Petersburg
properties.descricao: The BBC's Russia editor saw Putin's flagship economic event overshadowed by Ukrainian drones attacks.

properties.titulo_evento: Giant banquets rile radical left in France
properties.descricao: The feasting phenomenon run by Le Canon Français has become a hot political issue.

properties.descricao: Polls close in Armenian’s decisive election for the South Caucasus country and the region’s future, against the backdrop of a Russia-West clash

properties.titulo_evento: Man opens fire in central Israel killing one person and injuring five others
properties.descricao: Israeli media say the attacker carried out the shootings from inside his car, allowing him to reach several locations within a matter of minutes.

properties.titulo_evento: Washington could tap into Iran's frozen billions to pay for Gulf attack damage
properties.descricao: The Iranian assets Washington is considering reallocating could include frozen funds, along with ships previously seized by the United States.

properties.titulo_evento: Israeli strike kills nine including Lebanese soldiers as border truce under pressure
properties.descricao: Lebanon has accused Israel of undermining ceasefire efforts after an airstrike killed three members of its army in the country's south.

properties.titulo_evento: Dua Lipa and Callum Turner celebrate with guests at Sicily wedding party
properties.descricao: Newlyweds Dua Lipa and Callum Turner were seen greeting guests and celebrating at a wedding party in Palermo, Sicily, as part of a weekend of festivities following their recent London wedding.

properties.titulo_evento: Aoun tells Iran 'this is our country' as Araqchi warns of Lebanon's 'real enemy'
properties.descricao: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun accused Iran of exploiting Lebanon in its conflict with the US and Israel while calling for direct peace talks with Israel and Hezbollah’s disarmament.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran and US exchange strikes in latest threat to fragile ceasefire
properties.descricao: The US claims to have intercepted Iranian drones before launching missile strikes on what it described as "radar sites" in the south of Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: Armenia's parliamentary election a vote on nation's 'geopolitical future'
properties.descricao: Armenians voted on Sunday in a parliamentary election seen as a test of the government's efforts to forge a peace deal following a crushing military defeat by Azerbaijan three years ago. "This is really a vote on the geopolitical future of Armenia a...

properties.titulo_evento: Armenia votes in test of PM Pashinyan's pivot away from Russia

properties.titulo_evento: One dead, five wounded after shootings in Israel
properties.descricao: A Palestinian man with Israeli citizenship went on a shooting rampage in several towns in central Israel on Sunday, killing one person and wounding five others, according to Israeli police. The attacker was killed by police. The attack came at a tim...

properties.titulo_evento: Russian disinformation in Armenia 'neither a surprise nor effective', expert says
properties.descricao: Fake news spread by Russia in Armenia as the country held legislative elections came as "neither a surprise nor effective", said Richard Giragosian, founding director of the Regional Studies Center.

properties.titulo_evento: One killed, five wounded in terror attacks in Israel
properties.descricao: At least one person was killed and five others wounded in multiple shootings in Israel on Sunday, and security forces killed an attacker identified as a Palestinian citizen of Israel. Israel's emergency service Magen David Adom said a man aged aroun...

properties.titulo_evento: Iran heads to World Cup in Mexico amid bitter visa standoff with Washington
properties.descricao: Iran's World Cup squad is expected to arrive in Mexico early Sunday under the shadow of a bitter diplomatic row between Tehran and Washington, after the United States refused to issue visas for some team support staff.

properties.titulo_evento: Armenians vote in parliamentary elections seen as ‘referendum on independence’

properties.titulo_evento: Pope Leo in Spain: More than a million line Madrid streets
properties.descricao: Huge crowds welcomed Pope Leo XIV to Madrid on Sunday. The pontiff is on a five-day trip around Spain during which he is meeting vulnerable people such as migrants and the homeless, and promoting "genuine human values."

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine: Russian drone hits nuclear-fuel storage facility
properties.descricao: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has called a Russian attack on a nuclear storage facility near Chernobyl "vile." The UN's nuclear watchdog said no increased radiation had been registered at the site.

properties.titulo_evento: Peru votes for new president — for ninth time in 10 years
properties.descricao: Peru could soon have its ninth president in 10 years, as voters choose between Keiko Fujimori and Roberto Sanchez in a runoff election overshadowed by instability and crime.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Far-right AfD makes push in district elections
properties.descricao: Sunday's district polls are seen as a barometer for elections in eastern states in September. Meanwhile, Chancellor Merz is headed to London to discuss the Ukraine war as Putin rejects face-to-face talks. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Middle East: Israel strikes Beirut in first since ceasefire
properties.descricao: The Israeli military said it is carrying out strikes on infrastructure it says belongs to Iran-backed militant group Hezbollah. This comes after it said projectiles were shot at Israel earlier today. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Armenia, once Russia's reliable ally, considers an EU future
properties.descricao: Armenians are set to vote on the country's future geopolitical direction on June 7. The election will be a test of public opinion in the long-standing Russia ally, where the population is increasingly eyeing the EU.

properties.titulo_evento: Armenia votes in election with Russia and EU looking on
properties.descricao: Armenians have voted in elections that pit pro-EU Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan against the pro-Russia opposition. Peace efforts with longtime foe Azerbaijan are also a main election issue.

properties.titulo_evento: North Korea says nuclear program 'absolutely nonnegotiable'
properties.descricao: Kim Yo Jong, the sister of North Korean leader Kim Jong Un, has reaffirmed the country's nuclear ambitions ahead of a visit by Chinese President Xi Jinping.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany beat USA before World Cup but injuries cast shadow
properties.descricao: Germany’s final match before their World Cup start ended with a 2-1 win. But a tournament-ending injury to rising star Lennart Karl and doubts about veteran Manuel Neuer mean coach Julian Nagelsmann has work to do.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine hits St. Petersburg again after Putin rejects talks
properties.descricao: Ukrainian drones targeted St. Petersburg and the surrounding region for a second time after Russian President Vladimir Putin rejected Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy's offer of peace talks.

properties.titulo_evento: Hunger in Oleshky: Ukraine asks for evacuation
properties.descricao: The Ukrainian city of Oleshky has been occupied by Russian troops since 2022. Many residents are cut off from the outside world and living in dire conditions. Now, Kyiv wants to rescue them.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel targets Hezbollah with strike on Beirut despite ceasefire
properties.descricao: Clashes between Israel and Hezbollah continued over the weekend despite a U.S.-backed ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon, which Hezbollah has rejected.

properties.titulo_evento: EU warns Albania over Kushner-linked project

properties.titulo_evento: France and Cyprus to sign defense pact for French deployment to island
properties.descricao: The agreement “will provide for the presence of French forces on Cypriot territory, strictly for humanitarian purposes,” according to Cypriot President Nikos Christodoulides.

properties.descricao: The U.S. has at most six to 12 months before Beijing can compete with this new wave of hyper-advanced AI models.
